objective: Take threshold trades with >= 8% calibrated edge, size by quarter-Kelly, expand candidate pool to accumulate paper data.

rationale.v4_changes: Lowered min_abs_edge 0.15 -> 0.08 now that NGR sigma is calibrated per city+regime. Widened lead horizon 24h -> 48h. Bumped max_candidates_per_scan 3 -> 8 and max_new_orders_per_day 3 -> 10 to accumulate paper data faster. Switched execution sizing to quarter-Kelly with hard cap 20 contracts. v3 preserved as strategy_policy_v3.json for rollback.
